description: Proves ResearchAgent, QualityAgent, and SupervisorAgent have opt-in live governed evidence paths with deterministic fallback and no new authority.
preconditions: Model profiles include local-cheap-runner or deterministic fallback remains available.

steps.description: Run the 161 campaign for ResearchAgent, QualityAgent, and SupervisorAgent.

boundary: 161 proves opt-in live ResearchAgent, QualityAgent, and SupervisorAgent evidence paths. It does not grant writes, memory mutation, ticket creation, patch apply, quality override, self-approval, or ungated autonomy.
